data.title: National Healthcare Properties Announces Release Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York on May 01, 2026, National Healthcare Properties, Inc. (Nasdaq: NHP) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, post-market closure on Wednesday, May 13, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $77,000, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Bump 1%
data.description: Bitcoin reached a trading value exceeding $77,000 on Friday morning, with Bitcoin ETFs witnessing $14.8 million in net inflows on Thursday. Conversely, Ethereum ETFs experienced a net outflow of $23.6 million. The current prices for popular cryptocurrencies are: Bitcoin at $77,805, Ethereum at $2,305, Solana at $84.38, XRP at $1.39, Dogecoin at $0.1081, and Shiba Inu at $0.056303. The meme coin market capitalization has risen by 1.3% to $36.6 billion in the last 24 hours. Analyst Michael van de Poppe noted that Bitcoin commonly starts the month strongly, buoyed by ETF investments. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: She Does Everything for Everyone -- This Mother's Day, Give Her the One Thing She Actually Needs
data.description: The Floatation Tank Association, a float therapy industry group, aims to provide the science-supported benefits of floating to all mothers. A press release from SAN DIEGO on May 1, 2026, highlights this mission. The association emphasizes the importance of moms experiencing the benefits of floating, which includes managing stress and promoting relaxation.

data.title: Kari Curletto Crowned Winner of the Charm Weddings Toilet Paper Derby Hat Contest Presented by Ripley's Believe It or Not!
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, on May 1, 2026, CharmWeddings.com, known for the successful Toilet Paper Wedding Dress Contest, revealed the champions of the inaugural Toilet Paper Derby Hat Contest. This unique event blended DIY Toilet Paper Fashion with Kentucky Derby aesthetics, marking a new trend in creative competitions.

data.title: Fine Example of an 1806/5 Bust Half Dollar Coin Earns a $67,650 Payday at Morphy's $1.2M Premier Coins Auction
data.description: In Denver on May 1, 2026, several noteworthy coins were auctioned off for significant prices. Among them, an 1879-CC Morgan Dollar, graded MS65 PCGS, sold for $33,210. The auction also featured a 1798/7 overdate $10 Capped Bust Heraldic Eagle going for $32,595, and an 1856-S Liberty Head $20 gold Double Eagle fetching $23,370. One particular highlight was an 1806/5 Bust Half Dollar coin of the Overton-103a variety.

data.title: Retia Medical Presents First Public Results for Non-Invasive Cardiac Output Algorithm
data.description: Retia Medical unveiled groundbreaking news on May 1, 2026, introducing the public to its innovative non-invasive cardiac output algorithm. This technology enables the estimation of cardiac output through signals obtained from commonly used patient sensors, such as a pulse oximeter. This marks the initial public disclosure of the system's findings, showcasing the potential for advancing cardiovascular care. The algorithm's distinctive capability lies in deriving crucial cardiac output data without the need for additional invasive procedures or devices. This development signifies a significant milestone in medical technology, paving the way for improved patient monitoring and care.

data.title: La Luxe Dental Recognized on the 2026 Seminole 100 List for Outstanding Growth
data.description: A prominent dentist in Northeast Washington, Dr. Ashley Fagan, from La Luxe Dental, has achieved recognition by being included in the 2026 Seminole 100 list. This list highlights the rapid growth of businesses run by alumni of Florida State University. Dr. Fagan's practice is renowned for its success and is honored to be among the esteemed names on this list.

data.title: Child Care Access Key to Improving Parent Mental Health, According to New Research
data.description: In Lake Oswego, Oregon, a study conducted by KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. (NYSE: KLC) found that parents are facing increased stress in raising children. The research indicates that parents are experiencing burnout to the extent that they spend over one-third of each month feeling overwhelmed. The study, known as the KinderCare Confidence Index, in its seventh year and carried out with The Harris Poll, highlights the need to address parental burnout to enhance mental well-being.

data.title: SmartyPants Vitamins Authors New Peer-Reviewed Paper on Nutrition and Development During the First 1,000 Days, Highlighting the Role of Nutritional Support in Maternal and Fetal Health
data.description: A recent review paper sheds light on how nutrition impacts the simultaneous growth of the brain, gut, and sleep in the crucial early life stage. The review emphasizes the importance of this period for development and highlights the interconnectedness of these bodily functions. This research, conducted by SmartyPants Vitamins, a renowned vitamin brand recognized for their delicious and innovative products, underscores the significance of proper nutrition during this critical phase. The findings aim to raise awareness about the key role nutrition plays in fostering optimal brain function, gut health, and sleep patterns in infants and young children.
